name: Daily Digest
description: Daily morning email summary of yesterday's workspace activity, sent to the owner at a scheduled time.

args.subject: Your morning update from {{orgName}}
args.body:
Good morning {{firstName}},

Here's a gentle look at how yesterday went at Bright Smile Dental. A few new faces reached out, some appointments moved through the calendar, and the day wrapped up smoothly — nothing that needs to pull you away from patients this morning.

If anything stands out when you check the dashboard, it'll be waiting for you. Otherwise, take it easy into the day — we've got the small stuff covered.

Warmly,
— Bright Smile Dental
